news.t: KraneShares Launches AI-Powered China A-Share ETF (KCAI)

holdings.infoBox: KCAI is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are Zhejiang Juhua stock at 3.34%, Industrial and Commercial Bank of China at 3.29%, Bank of China at 3.27%, Agricultural Bank of China at 3.27%, and Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank at 3.26%.

overview.description: The KraneShares China Alpha Index ETF (KCAI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Qi China Alpha index. The fund tracks an index that seeks to outperform the CSI 300 Index by employing a systematic machine learning approach in selection and weighting of China A-shares. KCAI was launched on Aug 28, 2024 and is issued by KraneShares.
